pricing.metaDescription: Simple, credit-based pricing for {brand}, the {tagline}. Subscribe monthly or buy one-time top-ups whenever you need extra credits.
pricing.heading: Choose the credits that fit your workflow
pricing.subheading: Keep a recurring monthly balance or make a one-time purchase whenever you need extra credits.

starter.description: Recurring credits for ongoing work and predictable monthly usage.
starter.featureDailyBonusWithCap: {credits} daily bonus credits (up to {cap} each month)
starter.featureRollover: Roll over up to {cap} unused credits
starter.featureTopupAnytime: Top up anytime if you need more capacity
starter.autoRenewNote: Renews automatically. Manage or cancel anytime in billing.

topup.title: Credit top-up
topup.description: Buy extra credits once and keep them available for future usage.
topup.addedWithSinglePayment: {credits} credits added with a single payment
topup.featureNoRecurring: One-time payment with no recurring billing
topup.featureStandalone: Works on its own or alongside your subscription
topup.idealNote: Ideal when you only need extra credits from time to time.

errorMessage.reportDescription: Tell us what happened. We'll look into it right away and resolve it immediately.

steps.title: Ship a landing page in three steps

describe.title: Describe it
describe.desc: Tell Sunset what you want — your business, the vibe, the sections you need.

design.title: We design it
design.desc: Sunset ships a beautiful, on-brand site in seconds, ready to refine.

ship.title: You ship it
ship.desc: Iterate by chat, drop in your assets, and publish when you're ready.

cta.title: Ready to build something beautiful?
cta.subtitle: Start with a sentence. Iterate by chat. Publish when it feels right.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.
errors.emailExistsOauth: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in with your password.
errors.createUserFailed: Failed to create user. Please try again.
errors.createTeamFailed: Failed to create team. Please try again.
errors.signUpFailed: Failed to complete sign up. Please try again.
errors.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password must be different from the current password.
errors.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation password do not match.
errors.notInTeam: User is not part of a team.
errors.userAlreadyMember: User is already a member of this team.
errors.invitationAlreadySent: An invitation has already been sent to this email.
errors.oauthNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Please sign in with your password.
errors.oauthFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again or sign in with your password.
